author: Avigyan Sinha
name: MuonTTT WeightTied Recurrence — RoPE + RMSNorm + LeakyReLU²
blurb: Weight-tied recurrent transformer (1 shared block × 4 steps, dim=512, 8h) + Muon (2D) + Adam (emb/norms). Features: RMSNorm, RoPE, LeakyReLU(0.5)², logit softcap 30, SDClip int8+zlib. TTT (5 SGD steps on ln_f+block.norm, lr=1e-3) at eval. 2-seed mean val_bpb: 1.5063 (seed1337=1.5061, seed42=1.5065, std=0.0002). 1×H100 SXM, ~2000 steps in 10 min. Architecture designed for artifact efficiency: 3.80MB artifact, 12.2MB headroom for future scaling.
